block.aetheraddon.chudington_ore.tooltip: It glows with spuddy energy. Watch out for rats.
block.aetheraddon.spuddington_block.tool: 9 Spuddingtons compressed into pure drip. Wearable on feet.
block.aetheraddon.spud_vault.tooltip: Your spuds are safe here. Access from anywhere with a Spud Wallet.
block.aetheraddon.griptium_block.tooltip: 9 Griptium compressed. Used to craft GPUs.
block.aetheraddon.spud_miner.tooltip: Mines spuds passively. Needs GPUs, power, and an adjacent vault.
block.aetheraddon.gpu_cooler.tooltip: Place next to a Spud Miner. Each cooler reduces power by 20%. Max 3.
block.aetheraddon.miner_monitor.tooltip: Place next to a Spud Miner. Shows detailed mining stats.
block.aetheraddon.spud_network_cable.too: Connects Spud Miners to a Cluster Controller. Max 16 blocks.
block.aetheraddon.cluster_controller.too: Manages multiple miners via cables. Shows combined stats.
block.aetheraddon.spud_merchant.tooltip: A shop block. Configure trades via ComputerCraft. Buy with your wallet.
item.aetheraddon.spud_gpu.tooltip: Insert into a Spud Miner to increase hash rate.
item.aetheraddon.spuddington.tooltip: The ultimate superfood. You can feel it in your bones.
item.aetheraddon.spudding.tooltip: Enchanted by arcane spud magic. Smells faintly of feet.
item.aetheraddon.toe_jam.tooltip: Dropped by Spud Rats. Don't ask where it comes from.
item.aetheraddon.crushed_toe_jam.tooltip: Ground down to a fine, disgusting powder.
item.aetheraddon.grip_plate.tooltip: Pressed flat. Ready for arcane infusion.
block.aetheraddon.coolant_condenser.tool: Slowly cools heated coolant back into Gripper Coolant. Pipe in hot, pipe out cold.
item.aetheraddon.griptium.tooltip: Forged through feet, fire, and forbidden magic.
item.aetheraddon.griptium_pickaxe.toolti: Only works on Chudington Ore. Grips it real good.
item.aetheraddon.spud_familiar.tooltip: A rat spirit bound to spud magic. Boosts your mana significantly.
item.aetheraddon.spud_wallet.tooltip: Holds unlimited Spuds. Right-click to open.
death.attack.spud_rat: %1$s was nibbled to death by a Spud Rat
death.attack.spud_rat.player: %1$s was nibbled to death by %2$s's Spud Rat
